ops.text: A Plan-type subagent (v3-architect) finished its design work but went idle with only an idle_notification — its final message never transmitted to the orchestrator. I had to notice the silent idle and SendMessage a "send your completed design output" nudge before the (complete, high-quality) plan arrived. Same session, the two Explore agents delivered their digests unprompted, so the drop looks specific to how Plan agents end their run after processing a mid-run mailbox amendment: the amendment message may have consumed the "final response" slot. Cost: ~25 minutes of orchestrator wall-clock waiting on a result that was already done.
